Name: Rwandan Specialty Coffee
Description: High-altitude Arabica beans from Gisenyi, Rwanda. Hand-picked and sun-dried for a rich, fruity flavor profile.

Name: Hand-Woven Agaseke Basket
Description: Traditional Rwandan peace basket, hand-woven from sisal fiber and sweetgrass. Symbol of Rwandan heritage.

Name: Premium Chili Oil (Akabanga)
Description: Traditional Rwandan extra-hot chili oil. Distilled from the finest Rwandan habaneros.

Name: Mountain Honey
Description: 100% pure organic honey sourced from the Nyungwe Forest. Raw and unpasteurized.

Name: Artisan Tea (Silver Tip)
Description: Rare Rwandan white tea, hand-harvested and naturally dried. Delicate floral notes.

Name: Organic Passion Fruit
Description: Freshly harvested from local Gakenke farms. Sweet and tangy, perfect for juices.

Name: Traditional IMIGONGO Art
Description: Geometric cow dung art from eastern Rwanda. Modern institutional wall decor based on ancient patterns.
